productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Red Striped Top
description: Composition Red and green striped round neck top made of 67% polyester and 33% cotton, has a rolled neckline, long raglan sleeves and pleats from the neckline Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this red and green striped top from united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The rolled neckline adds to your style quotient while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look. Model statistics Product is a size XL on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
